aeo_readiness.summary: The business has basic AEO elements in place, such as a clear service offering and contact information, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and keyword optimization.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews to the website and encourage reviews on Google My Business.
Optimize website content with targeted keywords related to HVAC services in Naperville and surrounding areas.
Create dedicated service pages for each HVAC service offered to improve relevance and search visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: No evidence of a Google Business Profile (GBP) was found, which is crucial for local search visibility.
critical_issues: Missing GBP listing, which is essential for local search presence.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement on GBP, if it exists.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or incomplete NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations across the web, impacting local search performance.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Claim and update profiles on major local business directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Monitor and manage online citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized and service-specific content
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in specific suburbs like Hinsdale, Bolingbrook, and Downers Grove.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Create location-based service pages and optimize unique selling propositions for each area.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Develop a content strategy that includes blog posts, case studies, and customer testimonials to establish industry authority and improve search rankings.
